text:
There was once a wise old owl. He loved mysteries. One night owl heard singing.

One morning owl went outside. Singing bird.

Owl sang. Sing.

Afternoon owl found a treasure. Sunken ship. Coral bones.

That treasure belonged.

Shipwreck.

A map. Coral.

With map owl found island.

It wasn't mine. Just animal stuff.

Next owl. A fox.







Just be good.





That was hardest.






That fox.




I love story.




That owl.





That's OK.



That's weird.




Such owl.



That fox.



What fox.





That








I like stories.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
